results.original_title: Mt. Joy - Tour 2024 - Red Rocks Night 1
results.overview: On August 8th, 2024, Mt. Joy made a triumphant return to Red Rocks Amphitheatre, marking the first of two sold-out nights at the iconic venue. Hailing from Philadelphia, the indie-folk band has garnered a dedicated following with their rich, emotive sound.
results.title: Mt. Joy - Tour 2024 - Red Rocks Night 1
